message:
🐛 Fix useCache returning isLoading=true in demo mode (#759)

When demo mode is active (effectiveEnabled=false), the cache hook
was returning state.isLoading which starts as true. This caused
cards to render skeletons even though demo data was available.

The fix: Return isLoading=false immediately when demo mode is active,
since no fetching will occur and initialData (demo data) is ready.

Before: isLoading: state.isLoading
After:  isLoading: effectiveEnabled ? state.isLoading : false

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
